meta.title: Why did the US shoot a $600k missile at a balloon?
meta.description: On Saturday, the US shot down a Chinese surveillance balloon off the coast of South Carolina using the AIM-9X Sidewinder — a $600,000 air-to-air weapon. Why didn't they just use the F-22 Raptor's onboard 20mm cannon instead? #f22 #balloon #spyballoon #f22raptor #sidewindermissile #sidewinder
